      "question": "In a metric space, a set is said to be separated if it contains no subsets of the form {a, b} where a and b are distinct points in the space. What is the definition of a separated set?",
      "options": [
        "A) A set that contains no isolated points.",
        "B) A set that contains at least one isolated point.",
        "C) A set that contains no subsets of the form {a, b} where a and b are distinct points in the space.",
